title: welcome to my space
content: hey everyone! welcome to my new site. this is where i'll be posting updates, thoughts, and random stuff. hope u like it! feel free to interact and leave comments. xoxo

title: new music coming soon
content: working on some new tracks rn. can't wait to share them with u all! it's gonna be fire 🔥 stay tuned for updates

title: random thoughts at 2am
content: can't sleep. thinking about life, music, everything. sometimes i wonder if anyone actually reads these blog posts lol. but hey, if u're reading this, thanks for being here <3

title: merch drop incoming
content: new merch coming soon! t-shirts, hoodies, and more. all designed by me with that y2k aesthetic we all love. pre-orders open next week!

title: live stream this friday
content: doing a live stream this friday at 8pm! we'll be playing some music, chatting, and maybe doing some q&a. don't miss it!
